primary_diagnosis:
AML after lineage switch from pre-existing B-ALL (ID 03/2022), with
KMT2A-Rearrangement
Cytology: 28% monocytic blasts
FACS: 26% blasts in the Gate: CD45 intermediate, SSC intermediate, CD34-, CD117-,
HLA-DR+ (high), CD38+, CD33+, CD13+/-, CD64+, CD14-
Molecular genetics: NPM1 neg., FLT3-ITD/TKD neg., KRAS G12D pos., CEBPA neg.
Previous diagnosis: Pro-B-ALL, Initial diagnosis 12/2022
Cytology: 58% blasts.
Histology: Diffuse blast infiltration (85%), CD34+, PAX5+, TdT+.
FISH: KMT2A Rearrangement in 42% the analyzed interphase nuclei.
FACS: blast gate: CD34+, CD79a+, CD19+, CD22+, TdT+, MPO-, CD3-, CD7-, CD20-
BCR::ABL1 negative
question: Further Therapy?
raw_vignette:
Age: 53
ECOG: 1
Hematologic primary diagnosis:
AML after lineage switch from pre-existing B-ALL (ID 03/2022), with
KMT2A-Rearrangement
Cytology: 28% monocytic blasts
FACS: 26% blasts in the Gate: CD45 intermediate, SSC intermediate, CD34-, CD117-,
HLA-DR+ (high), CD38+, CD33+, CD13+/-, CD64+, CD14-
Molecular genetics: NPM1 neg., FLT3-ITD/TKD neg., KRAS G12D pos., CEBPA neg.
Previous diagnosis: Pro-B-ALL, Initial diagnosis 12/2022
Cytology: 58% blasts.
Histology: Diffuse blast infiltration (85%), CD34+, PAX5+, TdT+.
FISH: KMT2A Rearrangement in 42% the analyzed interphase nuclei.
FACS: blast gate: CD34+, CD79a+, CD19+, CD22+, TdT+, MPO-, CD3-, CD7-, CD20-
BCR::ABL1 negative
Secondary diagnoses:
Arterial hypertension
Type 2 diabetes mellitus
Treatment and course:
Question for the tumor board:
Further Therapy?
Tumor board decision:
Enrollment in Menin-Inhibitor-study.
================================================================================
TREATMENT TIMELINE
================================================================================
13.09.2021 Pre-phase (GMALL elderly): Dexamethason + Cyclophosphamid
20.09.2021 Induction I (GMALL EWALL BOLD)
12.10.2021 Remission assessment: 4% blasts; FACS (BM) MRD positive
19.10.2021 Blinatumomab Cycle 1 (28 µg/d)
17.11.2021 Remission assessment: 3% blasts; FACS (BM) MRD negative
02.12.2021 Consolidation I (2 parts)
06.01.2022 Remission assessment: 3% blasts; FACS (BM) MRD positive
11.01.2022 Blinatumomab Cycle 2 (28 µg/d)
16.02.2022 Consolidation II: HD-AraC (Cytarabin 1000 mg/m2)
28.04.2022 Re-induction; assessment: BM <5% blasts, FACS negative, MRD (Kiel)
negative; CSF negative
26.06.2022 Start Maintenance therapy
10.11.2022 assessment: BM <5% blasts; FACS positive; MRD (Kiel) negative
12.01.2023 assessment: BM <5% blasts; FACS positive; MRD (Kiel) negative
08.03.2023 Relapse with lineage switch to AML (mono.): 24-40% blasts; FACS ~21%
(CD34-/CD117-; CD33+/CD64+); Mol.: CEBPA+, NRAS+ (NPM1-/FLT3-)
15.03.2023 Venetoclax/Azacitidin Cycle 1
29.03.2023 BMA d15: 24% blasts; FACS MRD positive (~50% the CD45+ cells, LAIP)
13.04.2023 BMA d28: 17% blasts; FACS MRD positive (~15% the CD45+ cells, LAIP)
14.04.2023 Venetoclax/Azacitidin Cycle 2
04.05.2023 BMA: cytologically CR; FACS MRD negative
10.05.2023 Venetoclax/Azacitidin Cycle 3
08.06.2023 AML-Relapse: FACS ~30% monocytic blasts; FISH: KMT2A-Rearrangement ~7%
================================================================================
